title: More Nonsense Limerick 52
content:
There was an old man whose remorse
    Induced him to drink Caper Sauce;
    For they said, "If mixed up 
    With some cold claret-cup,
    It will certainly soothe your remorse!"
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "More Nonsense Limerick 52"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
